query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_page_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  trialSessionId INT NOT NULL,
  pagePath VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  pageTitle VARCHAR(255),
  enteredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  exitedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  timeOnPageSeconds INT,
  scrollDepthPercent INT,
  clickCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  previousPage VARCHAR(500),
  INDEX idx_page_views_user (trialUserId),
  INDEX idx_page_views_session (trialSessionId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (trialSessionId) REFERENCES trial_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_page_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  trialSessionId INT NOT NULL,
  pagePath VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  pageTitle VARCHAR(255),
  enteredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  exitedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  timeOnPageSeconds INT,
  scrollDepthPercent INT,
  clickCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  previousPage VARCHAR(500),
  INDEX idx_page_views_user (trialUserId),
  INDEX idx_page_views_session (trialSessionId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (trialSessionId) REFERENCES trial_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
